form.formComment: Didn't impress first-up beaten 30 m ninth behind Willows Girl at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR F on March 23. Finds a nice race and can improve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't impress first-up beaten 30 m ninth behind Willows Girl at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR F on March 23. Finds a nice race and can improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait under pressure inside the final 200m.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding by Warrawee Needy out of Glenburns Ace having his first start. Finished third in a trial on March 25 at Junee over 1760m.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Three-year-old gelding by Warrawee Needy out of Glenburns Ace having his first start. Finished third in a trial on March 25 at Junee over 1760m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Vincheska at Leeton over 1758m in a 2 WINs on March 10 at $13. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2 m finishing third behind Bettes Blue Violet at Junee over 1760m in a NR up to 50 M on March 17 at $126. Expected to go well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Vincheska at Leeton over 1758m in a 2 WINs on March 10 at $13. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2 m finishing third behind Bettes Blue Violet at Junee over 1760m in a NR up to 50 M on March 17 at $126. Expected to go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilised the sprint lane in the home straight.
Over raced at various stages of the race.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth after being driven well back, behind Ripples at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR F on March 23 at $101. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Perfectdelight at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR F on March 28 at $41. Expected to go well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into fifth after being driven well back, behind Ripples at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR F on March 23 at $101. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Perfectdelight at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR F on March 28 at $41. Expected to go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Upon entering the home straight, shifted ground.
Checked after the start as a result of Limeryck Lane breaking gait.

form.formComment: Last start by 2 m as favourite (Sr2) at Riverina Paceway (2:04.30) beating Pirani Princess in NR up to 52 on March 27 at $2.10 at the bell was leading 3. Great chance to make it two in a row.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by 2 m as favourite (Sr2) at Riverina Paceway (2:04.30) beating Pirani Princess in NR up to 52 on March 27 at $2.10 at the bell was leading 3. Great chance to make it two in a row.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle, beaten 85 m by Sparkling Sea (1:51.10) in 3yo LR No NR F on March 14 at $71. Two runs back 4th (Fr6) over 1740m after racing wide at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 2nd-0.7 beaten 2 m by Brooklyn Dan (2:01.40) in 3yo NR up to 58 on March 6 at $34. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1770m after showing early pace at Canberra, beaten 30 m by Steel Stride (2:09.70) in 3yo 1W/TS on March 15 at $7.50. Before that, 5th (Fr6) over 1770m after showing early speed and racing wide at Canberra beaten 17 m by The Heats On Lexy (2:11.20) in 3yo+ MAIDEN on March 9 at $9.50. Capable of a better showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1770m after showing early pace at Canberra, beaten 30 m by Steel Stride (2:09.70) in 3yo 1W/TS on March 15 at $7.50. Before that, 5th (Fr6) over 1770m after showing early speed and racing wide at Canberra beaten 17 m by The Heats On Lexy (2:11.20) in 3yo+ MAIDEN on March 9 at $9.50. Capable of a better showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced during the middle stages of the event.
Checked approaching the 200m when Coogee broke gait.

form.formComment: Resumed when beaten 10 m fifth behind Official View at Junee over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on March 31. No surprise if he turned things around.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumed when beaten 10 m fifth behind Official View at Junee over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on March 31. No surprise if he turned things around.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly facing the starter for the second time. At debut surrendered the lead and finished 7th (Fr2) over 1740m after showing early speed at Riverina Paceway beaten 50 m by Yirradiva (2:01.80) in 3yo NR up to 55 on March 13 at $51. Hard to recommend.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Three-year-old filly facing the starter for the second time. At debut surrendered the lead and finished 7th (Fr2) over 1740m after showing early speed at Riverina Paceway beaten 50 m by Yirradiva (2:01.80) in 3yo NR up to 55 on March 13 at $51. Hard to recommend.

form.formComment: Returns after six-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign recording a big 5.5 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Leeton (2:11.50) beating Caulonia Bella in 0-1 WIN on September 16 at $2.30 at the bell was leading 3.1m on the pegs. Has to contend with an awkward draw but has the talent to prevail.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns after six-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign recording a big 5.5 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Leeton (2:11.50) beating Caulonia Bella in 0-1 WIN on September 16 at $2.30 at the bell was leading 3.1m on the pegs. Has to contend with an awkward draw but has the talent to prevail.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced leaving the 1400m when the pace eased.
Hung in rounding the final turn and contacted marker pegs.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at Junee on March 31. Two runs back 5th (Fr1) over 1635m at this track was 5th-4.6 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Ceebee (2:02.50) in 3yo MAIDEN on March 3 at $8. This looks far too tough.
